outputs.description: A unique identifier for this incident ATPIncidents.Result.priority_level Priority level of the incident. 1 = LOW, 2 = MED, 3 = HIGH
outputs.name: ATPIncidents.Result.atp_incident_id

outputs.description: The state of the incident. 1 = OPEN,2 = WAITING,3 = IN_WORK,4 = CLOSED ATPIncidents.Result.recommended_action Recommended action for this incident
outputs.name: ATPIncidents.Result.state

outputs.description: When the first event associated with the incident was created ATPIncidents.Result.last_event_seen When the last event associated with the incident was created
outputs.name: ATPIncidents.Result.first_event_seen

outputs.description: The number of events associated with the incident ATPIncidents.Result.device_time The timestamp that specifies the time at which the event occurred
outputs.name: ATPIncidents.Result.event_count

outputs.description: A list of ATP endpoint devices UID on which the events occurred ATPIncidents.Result.scanners A list of ATP scanners that discovered the threat
outputs.name: ATPIncidents.Result.deviceUid

outputs.description: A list of SHA256 hashes associated with this incident ATPIncidents.Result.domainid A list of domains associated with this incident
outputs.name: ATPIncidents.Result.filehash

outputs.description: Summary information about the incident ATPIncidents.Result.time The creation time (in ISO 8601 format) of the incident
outputs.name: ATPIncidents.Result.summary

outputs.description: The time (in ISO 8601 format) of last modification ATPIncidents.Result.log_name The index/type of the originating event
outputs.name: ATPIncidents.Result.updated

outputs.description: The GUID assigned for this incident
outputs.name: ATPIncidents.Result.uuid
